title: How To Build a Website With 24/7 AI Sales Agent in 45 Seconds
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build AI-powered websites with 24/7 sales agents that qualify leads, answer customer questions, and book appointments automatically. The video shows two real client examples: a car dealership and luxury real estate business, using Readdy as the underlying platform with Claude integration for AI capabilities.
writeup: The tutorial walks through building AI-powered websites with embedded 24/7 sales agents that qualify leads, answer customer questions, and book appointments without manual intervention. It uses Readdy as the underlying platform with Claude integration providing the AI capabilities. Two real client builds anchor the demonstration: a car dealership and a luxury real estate business. The walkthrough also touches on lead enrichment, chatbots, and white-label deployment.
